doneExplanation: Your board should be restored. If this is not the case, you can try again or ask one of the volunteers for help.
chooseBoardTitle: Touch what you want to fix
flashingFailedButton: The flashing process seems to have failed. Do you want to try again? Be sure to follow the instructions!
flashingInProgress:
Busy with flashing
 Do not disconnect!
settingsExplanation: Download the flashing tools (esptool, avrdude, wchisp) and the latest firmware for all boards. An internet connection is required.
downloadFailed: Something went wrong while downloading. Check the log below and try again.
